home.title: Randomator 5684
home.info: The Randomator will help you decide in different situations.
home.warning: We do not accept liability for mental, physical, property and other damages caused by actions based on the generated value.

randomNumber.info: Enter the range of numbers from which the number is to be generated. (max 19 places)

magicBall.question: Ask question
magicBall.info: Enter a yes / no question and the magic ball will tell you the answer.

matches.info: Same principle as pulling toothpicks - shorter / longer = burnt / unfired.

crossroads.info: Enter the number of possible routes and the green arrow will show you which way to go.
